nasb.text: Therefore behold, I will once again deal marvelously with this people, wondrously marvelous; And the wisdom of their wise men will perish, And the discernment of their discerning men will be concealed.”

esv.text: therefore, behold, I will again do wonderful things with this people, with wonder upon wonder; and the wisdom of their wise men shall perish, and the discernment of their discerning men shall be hidden.”

cnv.text: 因此，看哪！我要再向這子民施行奇事， 就是奇妙又奇妙的事； 他們智慧人的智慧必要消沒， 他們聰明人的聰明必被隱藏。”

ccb.text: 所以，我要再次行奇妙无比的事，使他们震惊。 他们智者的智慧必泯灭， 明哲的聪明必消失。”

csbs.text: 因此，看哪，我要再次向这子民行奇妙的事， 是奇妙又奇妙的事； 他们智慧人的智慧必会消亡， 有悟性之人的悟性必被隐藏！”
